blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,222 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
